headline: Monsters Cereals Celebrate 55 Years of Halloween Memories with an Encore Collaboration in Partnership with The Jim Henson Company
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, July 21, 2026--General Mills is pouring a bowl of bewitching fun with the return of the limited-edition Monsters Cereals. This year marks the 55th anniversary of Count Chocula, Boo Berry and Franken Berry and to celebrate, the iconic cereals are returning with newly designed packaging and the reimagined puppets created by The Jim Henson Company, first introduced last year.

content.title: Monsters Cereals Celebrate 55 Years of Halloween Memories with an Encore Collaboration in Partnership with The Jim Henson Company
content.summary: MINNEAPOLIS, July 21, 2026--General Mills is pouring a bowl of bewitching fun with the return of the limited-edition Monsters Cereals. This year marks the 55th anniversary of Count Chocula, Boo Berry and Franken Berry and to celebrate, the iconic cereals are returning with newly designed packaging and the reimagined puppets created by The Jim Henson Company, first introduced last year.

thumbnail.caption: The limited-edition Monsters Cereals from General Mills and The Jim Henson Company creep back to grocery store shelves nationwide late this summer.
